The Dictator (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $59,650,222Details
International Box Office $120,498,675
Worldwide Box Office $180,148,897
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,774,850
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,037,396
Total $8,812,246
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The heroic story of a North African dictator who risks his life to ensure that democracy will never come to the country he so lovingly oppressed.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$17,435,092 (29.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.42 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:33.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$65,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,008 opening theaters/3,014 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $89,625,202

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 16th, 2012 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: May 16th, 2012 (Wide) (Belgium)
May 16th, 2012 (Wide) (Denmark)
May 16th, 2012 (Wide) (Australia)
May 16th, 2012 (Wide) (Finland)
May 16th, 2012 (Wide) (Sweden)
Video Release: August 21st, 2012 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for strong crude and sexual content, brief male nudity, language and some violent images.
(Rating bulletin 2220, 4/25/2012)
Running Time: 83 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Archive Footage, Epilogue, Gratuitous Cameos, Improvised, Intertitle, Invented Language, Outtakes During Credits, Prologue, Same Actor, Multiple Roles, Scene in End Credits, Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: Bigotry, Culture Clash, Government Corruption, Mistaken Identity, Non-Chronological, Political, Romance, Terrorism
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, Four by Two Films, Berg Mandel, Scott Rudin Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English, Arabic
